hypothesis: A GraphSAGE mixture model trained only on Ar/O2 binary-mixture data and equipped with pre-trained single-gas predictors for Ar, O2, and CF4 will, without any retraining, predict PMMA radial etch-rate profiles for Ar/O2/CF4 ternary plasmas across 10–70 mTorr and 50–2000 W with R2 ≥ 0.85 when node features are taken from each single-gas network’s penultimate hidden layer.
